description: A research team is conducting the 'Youth Development Study'. Wave 1 has been completed. Your task is to set up the Wave 2 survey. Login to LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). Create and activate a new survey titled 'Youth Development Study - Wave 2' by copying the existing 'Youth Development Study - Wave 1' survey. The new Wave 2 survey must exclude the 'Baseline Demographics' question group while retaining the 'School Experience' and 'Family Context' groups. Additionally, include a new question group named 'Recent Changes' containing a Yes/No question with the code 'moved' and the question text 'Have you moved to a different home in the past 12 months?'.
